nasb.text: That it may cause wrath to come up to take vengeance, I have put her blood on the bare rock, That it may not be covered.”

esv.text: To rouse my wrath, to take vengeance, I have set on the bare rock the blood she has shed, that it may not be covered.

cnv.text: 我為了發烈怒，好施行報應， 就把她的血倒在光滑的磐石上， 以致不得掩蓋。

ccb.text: 我任凭这城把受害者的血洒在磐石上，不加掩盖，好激起我的烈怒，使她受报应。
